principles: Prefer widely recognized English spellings used in Ramayana scholarship.
Preserve epic terms such as Dharma, Rishi, Rakshasa, Vanara, Yajna, and Kanda instead of flattening them into modern equivalents.
Use honorifics such as Sri, Maharshi, and Devi only when present or strongly implied by devotional phrasing.
Keep person, place, Kanda, and theological term spellings consistent across all chunks.
When OCR uncertainty affects meaning, mark uncertainty in translation_notes instead of inventing content.
